violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

(Chicken breast) was observed thawing in 3 bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (refrigeration units, stove hoods, cooking equipment, and ceiling lights ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The (ceiling ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed missing tile exposing exhaust/hvac duct. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The following non food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.all refrigeration units have food residue and other debris. 2.hoods observed with grease and other debris. 3.pipes and equipment near fryer have an accumulation of grease and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Handwashing sink in the restroom was lacking signage. A sign or poster must be posted to notify food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Linens were observed being stored in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the (all) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back dining room area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Knives observed being stored in between prep units. Knives were removed to ware washing area to be wash and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 48DF.PIC moved items that were prepped within time /temp for food safety to another unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.all refrigeration units have food residue and other debris. 2.prep table in kitchen have soil residue, food residue, and other debris 3.hoods observed with dust and grease. 4.equipment shelves have dust and/or other debris. 5.ceiling vents have an accumulation of dust. 6.pipes and equipment near fryer have and accumulation of grease and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The floors in the kitchen and front counter area is in poor repair. Observed damage and/or missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
